title: astragalus introflexa
intro: Astragalus introflexa, also known as Chinese milkvetch, is a perennial legume native to China, characterized by its hairy stems and purple flowers. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immune-boosting effects. The health benefits of Astragalus introflexa include reducing fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing the body's natural defense against infections. Astragalus introflexa can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
